roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOTION TO RELEASE ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE OR ON AFFORDABLE BAIL FILED

/INTC/X:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(A), A STRAIGHT SENTENCE/AJW/DNACOMP/DEF:IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 7 TO 16 MONTHS, THE LOW TERM/DEF:IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 8 TO 16 MONTHS, THE LOW TERM,CONCURRENT/STATES/X:TOTAL 16MONTHS/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(A), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:CJ  16 M /CTS: 129/PROBREVFN1:300/SUSFF/4019HALF/

/CAL  TO SET APD MTR AND DA MTR/X  #21010990 IS TRAILING/MTR-DA-APD/DEFTADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:11-5-21/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ: 120 DAYS /ADDL CTS:20/PROB EXT: 9-8-24/4019HALF/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY ADULT PROBATION/CTORD: ADULTPROBATION WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT WITHIN 24 HOURS OF RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS ATTHATTIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING TO BE MONITORED BY ADULT PROBATION FOR   180  DAYS UPON RELEASE/

/X: THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE/CAL: APD MTR & DA MTR FILING/09    CTS APD MTR/WIAMTR/S9/TBH:21010990/PROB ADM REV/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: HOME DETENTION/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2:GEARY & LARKIN ST, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/
/CAL: TO SET DA MTR, TRAILING #21009183 AND DEFENSE MOTION FOR BAIL REDUCTION/INTC/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA: 09-16-21/TWS/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ: 14 DAYS/ADDL CTS: 14/PROB EXT: 09-09-24/

/CAL:SENTENCING & RECEIPT OF PSR/X:PD IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/INTC/AJW/CH7:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 81D/CTS:81/CCC:COUNTS #7 & #8/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/DTC/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/RESTV/WEAP/X:DEFENDANT TO WEAR GPS FOR 6 MONTHS AND TO BE MONITORED BY THE APD/SA1:PIYUSHKUMARPATEL & RINESHABEN P, PATEL/SAORD3/SA2:MOTEL 6 AT 895 GEARY ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/X:DEFENDANT TO ATTEND ANGER MANAGEMENT AS DIRECTED BY THE APD/X:PURSUANT TO HARVEY WAIVR, ANY OUTSTANDING TERMS AND CONDITIONS FROM #21005967ARE TRANSFERRED TO THIS CASE/
